message:
✨ Add server-side test suite: 90 tests across 5 modules (#167)

Add vitest to server with tests for security-critical and core modules:

- swarm-rate-limiter (10 tests): sliding window, per-key isolation, cleanup
- swarm-blocklist (29 tests): 30+ destructive command patterns, safe commands
- prompt-detector (22 tests): prompt patterns, ANSI stripping, debounce, lifecycle
- session-meta (13 tests): tag CRUD, metadata persistence, merge behavior
- todo-store (6 tests): persistence, recurring fields, status values

Total: 90 server tests + 45 web tests = 135 tests

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
